candidate_summary: 9-attack-channel attacker (fist-L/R, elbow-L/R, knee-L/R, shin-L/R, headbutt) + bareknuckle no-glove no-smoothing direct input + 9th-limb headbutt signature high-impact bypass + KO-revive 2-min timeout checkpoint-rollback + 9-channel specialized defender.
content_words: tape gauze hand wrap KO revive
fist elbow knee shin head attack channel

results.name: STACK Staged Adversarial Attacks
results.rationale: Staged multi-step attacks share sequential channel idea; no 9-limb specialization + no bareknuckle direct-input + no KO-revive rollback.

results.name: RedTWIZ Diverse Red-Teaming
results.rationale: Adaptive red-teaming planning loosely echoes 9-channel diversity; lacks per-limb defender + checkpoint rollback.

results.name: LLM Attacks Universal Transferable
results.rationale: Single-channel gradient style; no multi-limb + no revive.

results.name: Meta SecAlign Multi-Attack Defense
results.rationale: Multi-attack defense aligns with 9-channel defender concept; no attacker coevolution + no headbutt bypass + no KO-revive.

results.name: ARLAS Adversarial RL Two-Player
results.rationale: Closest to attacker-defender dynamic + rollback potential; lacks 9-limb channel split + bareknuckle no-smoothing + headbutt signature.

results.name: Continuous Embedding Attacks
results.rationale: Smoothing-style embedding attacks; opposite of bareknuckle direct-input philosophy.

results.name: Short-Length Adversarial Defends Long Jailbreak
results.rationale: Defense-focused single channel; no 9-limb + no KO-revive.

results.name: Prompt Injection LLM Survey
results.rationale: Survey taxonomic only; no coevolutionary 9-channel + no bareknuckle direct-input.

decision_rationale: No prior art reaches kw>=2 / sem>=0.7 / func>=0.7; 9-limb attack channels + bareknuckle no-smoothing + 9th-limb headbutt signature + KO-revive 2-min timeout checkpoint-rollback + 9-channel specialized defender appear novel combination. NOTE: primary scored 8 hits at sem 0.78-0.88 / func 0.78-0.88 on red-team + adversarial-RL adjacencies; verdict-level disagreement flagged.
